---
title: "Tests"
---




```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source('assets/setup.R')
library(xaringanExtra)
xaringanExtra::use_panelset()
```

:::lo
learning obj
:::

:::sticky
sticky
:::

:::divider
:::

:::rtip
r tips
:::

:::int
interprtation
interprtation
interprtation
:::


::::panelset
:::panel
this is not a panel (jokes, it is)
:::
:::panel
this is a panel
:::
:::panel
this is a panel
:::

::::
